job_details.title: AI Chatbot for Education Platform
job_details.description: Need a developer to build a RAG-powered chatbot for students and teachers.

bids.proposal_text: Hi, this aligns closely with AI systems I have built recently. I can help you design a clean RAG workflow, keep retrieval reliable, and ship something practical for students and teachers.

job_details.title: Full Stack SaaS Dashboard Improvement
job_details.description: Need a developer to improve API integrations and frontend flows in an existing SaaS product.

bids.proposal_text: Hi, this sounds like a strong fit. I usually work end to end on exactly these kinds of improvements, from API cleanup to frontend polish, while keeping the code easy for the next developer to maintain.
